texto: All of us have a shadow man dogging our steps that we cannot shake, no matter how hard we try. He reminds us at our best that we are not as good as we appear to be; he bites at our heel with guilt when we find ourselves behaving far beneath our own expectations. That is the human condition. That is why we yearn so for redemption.
explicacao: Citação de Pamela Kay Hawkins sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “All of us have a shadow man dogging our steps that we cannot shake, no matter how hard we try. He…” articula reflexao, expectations, guilt em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como guilt e human.
